title: Words For Wednesday: October
excerpt: Even though yesterday was far too warm to be considered Fall, I love this quote about October from L.M. Montgomery! “I’m so glad I live in a world where there are Octobers.”
content:
Even though yesterday was far too warm to be considered Fall, I love this quote about October from L.M. Montgomery!

“I’m so glad I live in a world where there are Octobers.”

Agreed! October is my favorite month of the year- even more so than November, my birth month! Don’t tell November, though.

What is your favorite month and why?
